pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh configuration, and verifier.py logic.
Subsurface Linux configuration path used in setup_task.sh and verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 8 real dives (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) sourced from the official Subsurface repository, featuring trips to Sund Rock and Yellow House, WA. The requested database path is /home/ga/Documents/dive_data.sqlite, and Subsurface's preferences are stored at /home/ga/.config/Subsurface/Subsurface.conf.
